zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Legh於1445年10月7日出生在英國爾阿德林頓時，她的父親Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington35歲，母親Isabell Stanley34歲。她和Andrew Brereton至少有4個兒子和6個女兒。她去世於1493年在英國英格蘭爾享年48歲，埋葬在英國爾切斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Legh于1445年10月7日出生在英国爾阿德林頓时，她的父亲Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington35岁，母亲Isabell Stanley34岁。她和Andrew Brereton至少有4个儿子和6个女儿。她去世于1493年在英国英格兰爾享年48岁，埋葬在英国爾切斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Legh

variants.name: Leigh
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Legh was born on 7 October 1445, in Adlington, Cheshire, England, her father, Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington, was 35 and her mother, Isabell Stanley, was 34. She had at least 4 sons and 6 daughters with Andrew Brereton. She died in 1493, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48, and was buried in Chester, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Legh est née le 7 octobre 1445, à Adlington, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Isabell Stanley, avait 34 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles avec Andrew Brereton. Elle est décédée en 1493, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Legh am 7. Oktober 1445 in Adlington, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington 35 und ihre Mutter Isabell Stanley 34. Sie hatte mit Andrew Brereton mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1493 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Chester, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Legh è nata il il 7 ottobre 1445 nel Adlington, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Isabell Stanley, aveva 34 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie con Andrew Brereton. Morì nel 1493, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Chester, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Leghが1445年10月7日にイギリスチェシュアイアアドリントンで生まれた時，父Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlingtonは35歳，母Isabell Stanleyは34歳であった。彼女はAndrew Breretonとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1493年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで48歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Legh(이)가 1445년 10월 7일 영국 체실르 애들링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabell Stanley(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 Andrew Brereton(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1493년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 체스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Legh nasceu em 7 de outubro de 1445, em Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Isabell Stanley, tinha 34 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas com Andrew Brereton. Ela faleceu em 1493, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Legh родилась 7 октября 1445 г. в местности адлингтон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabell Stanley, 34. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей от Andrew Brereton. Она умерла в 1493 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности честир, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Legh nació el 7 de octubre de 1445, en Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Isabell Stanley, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas con Andrew Brereton. Murió en 1493, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
